   640→    /**
   641→     * 计算分段策略 - 智能分段
   642→     * 1. 根据码率计算最大分段时长（确保不超过 API 文件大小限制）
   643→     * 2. 使用 FFmpeg silencedetect 找到静音点作为自然分段边界
   644→     * 3. 在静音点处分段，避免在语句中间切断
   645→     */
   646→    private fun calculateSegments(duration: Double, fileSize: Long = 0): List<AudioSegment> {
   647→        // 根据文件大小和时长计算最佳分段时长
   648→        val estimatedBitrate = if (fileSize > 0 && duration > 0) {
   649→            (fileSize * 8.0 / duration / 1000.0) // kbps
   650→        } else {
   651→            128.0
   652→        }
   653→
   654→        // 计算确保不超过 TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE 的最大分段时长
   655→        val maxSegmentDurationForSize = if (estimatedBitrate > 0) {
   656→            (TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE * 8.0 / estimatedBitrate / 1000.0).coerceAtMost(SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble())
   657→        } else {
   658→            SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble()
   659→        }
   660→
   661→        // 不低于 2 分钟
   662→        val targetSegmentDuration = maxSegmentDurationForSize.coerceAtLeast(120.0)
   663→
   664→        Log.d(TAG, "Segment strategy: targetDuration=${targetSegmentDuration.toInt()}s, bitrate=${estimatedBitrate.toInt()}kbps, totalDuration=${duration.toInt()}s")
   665→
   666→        // 如果总时长不需要分段
   667→        if (duration <= targetSegmentDuration + 30) {
   668→            return listOf(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   669→        }
   670→
   671→        // 构建分段：在目标时长附近寻找自然断点
   672→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
   673→        var currentStart = 0.0
   674→        var index = 0
   675→
   676→        while (currentStart < duration - 10) { // 剩余不足10秒就合并到上一段
   677→            val idealEnd = (currentStart + targetSegmentDuration).coerceAtMost(duration)
   678→
   679→            if (idealEnd >= duration - 10) {
   680→                // 最后一段，直接到结尾
   681→                segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, duration - currentStart))
   682→                break
   683→            }
   684→
   685→            // 实际分段时长（加 OVERLAP_DURATION 的重叠）
   686→            val segmentDuration = idealEnd - currentStart
   687→            segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, segmentDuration))
   688→
   689→            // 下一段从重叠点开始
   690→            currentStart = idealEnd - OVERLAP_DURATION
   691→            index++
   692→        }
   693→
   694→        // 如果循环结束但没有覆盖到末尾
   695→        if (segments.isEmpty()) {
   696→            segments.add(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   697→        }
   698→
   699→        Log.d(TAG, "Created ${segments.size} segments")
   700→        return segments
   701→    }
   702→
   703→    /**
   704→     * 提取音频段 - 使用 stream copy 避免重新编码
   705→     */
   706→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegment(
   707→        inputFile: File,
   708→        outputFile: File,
   709→        startTime: Double,
   710→        duration: Double
   711→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   712→        try {
   713→            // 确保输出目录存在
   714→            outputFile.parentFile?.mkdirs()
   715→
   716→            // 构建命令字符串 - 使用 -c copy 直接复制音频流，不重新编码
   717→            val commandStr = buildString {
   718→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   719→                append("-ss $startTime ")
   720→                append("-i \"${inputFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   721→                append("-t $duration ")
   722→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   723→                append("-c:a copy ")  // 直接复制音频流，不重新编码
   724→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   725→            }
   726→
   727→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   728→            Log.d(TAG, "Input file: ${inputFile.absolutePath}, size: ${inputFile.length()}")
   729→            Log.d(TAG, "Output file: ${outputFile.absolutePath}")
   730→
   731→            // 使用同步执行
   732→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   733→
   734→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   735→            val output = session.output
   736→
   737→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   738→            if (output?.isNotEmpty() == true) {
   739→                Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg output: ${output.substring(0, minOf(200, output.length))}")
   740→            }
   741→
   742→            // 检查输出文件
   743→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 1024
   744→
   745→            Log.d(TAG, "Segment extraction result: $success, file size: ${outputFile.length()}, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   746→            success
   747→
   748→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   749→            Log.e(TAG, "Error extracting segment", e)
   750→            false
   751→        }
   752→    }
   753→
   754→    /**
   755→     * 压缩音频文件用于转录
   756→     * 确保文件大小符合 API 限制
   757→     */
   758→    private suspend fun compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile: File): File? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   759→        try {
   760→            val tempFile = File(context.cacheDir, "compressed_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.m4a")
   761→
   762→            val commandStr = buildString {
   763→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   764→                append("-i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   765→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   766→                append("-acodec aac ")  // 使用 AAC 编码
   767→                append("-b:a 24k ")  // 24kbps 比特率
   768→                append("-ac 1 ")  // 单声道
   769→                append("-ar 16000 ")  // 16kHz 采样率（Whisper 推荐的最小值）
   770→                append("\"${tempFile.absolutePath}\"")
   771→            }
   772→
   773→            Log.d(TAG, "Compression command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   774→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   775→
   776→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   777→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0 || returnCode?.value == 1) && tempFile.exists()
   778→
   779→            if (success) {
   780→                Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${tempFile.length()} bytes")
   781→                tempFile
   782→            } else {
   783→                Log.e(TAG, "Compression failed: return code ${returnCode?.value}")
   784→                tempFile.delete()
   785→                null
   786→            }
   787→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   788→            Log.e(TAG, "Error compressing audio", e)
   789→            null
   790→        }
   791→    }

   793→    /**
   794→     * 获取视频信息
   795→     */
   796→    private fun getMediaInformation(file: File): com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.MediaInformation? {
   797→        return try {
   798→            Log.d(TAG, "Getting media information for: ${file.absolutePath}")
   799→            val session: MediaInformationSession = FFprobeKit.getMediaInformation(file.absolutePath)

   801→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe return code: ${session.returnCode?.value}")

   803→
   804→            if (session.returnCode?.value == 0) {

   810→                Log.e(TAG, "FFprobe output: ${session.output}")
   811→                null
   812→            }
   813→        } catch (e: Exception) {

   815→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   816→            null
   817→        }
   818→    }

   820→    /**
   821→     * 从单词构建句子
   822→     */
   823→    private fun buildSentences(words: List<WordTimestamp>): List<String> {
   824→        val sentences = mutableListOf<String>()
   825→        val currentSentence = mutableListOf<String>()
   826→
   827→        words.forEach { wt ->
   828→            currentSentence.add(wt.w)
   829→
   830→            // 检查句子结束
   831→            if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$"))) {
   832→                sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   833→                currentSentence.clear()
   834→            }
   835→        }
   836→
   837→        // 添加最后一个未完成的句子
   838→        if (currentSentence.isNotEmpty()) {
   839→            sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   840→        }
   841→
   842→        return sentences
   843→    }
   844→}

   359→                    errorCode = e.javaClass.simpleName

   366→    /**
   367→     * 使用分段下载器下载视频
   368→     */
   369→    private suspend fun downloadWithSegmentedDownloader(
   370→        taskId: String,
   371→        url: String,
   372→        videoInfo: com.multilanglearner.data.network.VideoDownloadService.VideoDownloadInfo,
   373→        title: String,
   374→        outputFile: File,
   375→        onComplete: (String, String?) -> Unit
   376→    ) {
   377→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   378→        var lastUpdate = startTime
   379→
   380→        try {
   381→            val config = SegmentedDownloader.DownloadConfig(
   382→                url = videoInfo.downloadUrl,
   383→                outputFile = outputFile,
   384→                enableResume = true,
   385→                // 使用当前配置的Cookie（如果可用）
   386→                cookies = currentBilibiliCookie ?: videoInfo.cookies,
   387→                // 音频流URL（用于DASH格式）
   388→                audioUrl = videoInfo.audioUrl,
   389→                onProgress = { progress ->
   390→                    val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
   391→                    // 限制更新频率（每200ms更新一次）
   392→                    if (now - lastUpdate > 200) {
   393→                        val elapsedSeconds = (now - startTime) / 1000.0
   394→                        val speed = progress.speed
   395→                        val remainingBytes = progress.totalBytes - progress.bytesDownloaded
   396→                        val remainingTime = if (speed > 0) remainingBytes / speed else 0L
   397→
   398→                        // 直接使用 taskId 更新对应的任务进度
   399→                        val currentTask = activeDownloadTasks[taskId]
   400→                        if (currentTask != null) {
   401→                            val updatedTask = currentTask.copy(
   402→                                status = DownloadStatus.DOWNLOADING,
   403→                                progress = progress.percent,
   404→                                bytesDownloaded = progress.bytesDownloaded,
   405→                                totalBytes = progress.totalBytes,
   406→                                speed = speed,
   407→                                remainingTime = remainingTime,
   408→                                title = currentTask.title ?: title
   409→                            )
   410→                            updateActiveDownloadTask(taskId, updatedTask)
   411→                        }
   412→                        lastUpdate = now
   413→                    }
   414→                }
   415→            )
   416→
   417→            val result = segmentedDownloader.download(config)
   418→
   419→            result.onSuccess { file ->
   420→                // 直接使用传入的 taskId
   421→                val currentTask = activeDownloadTasks[taskId]
   422→                if (currentTask != null) {
   423→                    val completedTask = currentTask.copy(
   424→                        status = DownloadStatus.COMPLETED,
   425→                        progress = 100,
   426→                        completedAt = System.currentTimeMillis()
   427→                    )
   428→                    onDownloadCompleted(taskId, completedTask, file, onComplete)
   429→                }
   430→            }.onFailure { error ->
   431→                // 直接使用传入的 taskId
   432→                val currentTask = activeDownloadTasks[taskId]
   433→                if (currentTask != null) {
   434→                    onDownloadFailed(taskId, currentTask, "下载失败: ${error.message}")
   435→                }
   436→            }
   437→
   438→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   439→            android.util.Log.e("HomeViewModel", "Segmented download failed", e)
   440→            // 这里不需要额外处理，因为 onFailure 已经处理了
   441→        }
   442→    }

   444→    /**
   445→     * 取消当前下载
   446→     */
   447→    fun cancelDownload(taskId: String? = null) {
   448→        if (taskId != null) {
   449→            // 取消特定任务 - 直接删除，不保留记录
   450→            activeDownloadJobs[taskId]?.cancel()
   451→            activeDownloadTasks[taskId]?.let { task ->
   452→                activeDownloadTasks.remove(taskId)
   453→                activeDownloadJobs.remove(taskId)
   454→                updateActiveDownloads()
   455→
   456→                // 清理临时文件
   457→                if (task.totalBytes > 0) {
   458→                    val safeTitle = task.title.replace(Regex("[\\\\/:*?\"<>|]"), "_").take(50)
   459→                    val outputFile = File(downloadsDir, "${safeTitle}_${task.createdAt}.mp4")
   460→                    segmentedDownloader.cancelDownload(outputFile)
   461→                }
   462→            }
   463→            // 处理队列中的下一个任务
   464→            processQueue()
   465→        } else {
   466→            // 取消所有任务 - 直接删除，不保留记录
   467→            activeDownloadJobs.values.forEach { it.cancel() }
   468→            activeDownloadTasks.values.forEach { task ->
   469→                // 清理临时文件
   470→                if (task.totalBytes > 0) {
   471→                    val safeTitle = task.title.replace(Regex("[\\\\/:*?\"<>|]"), "_").take(50)
   472→                    val outputFile = File(downloadsDir, "${safeTitle}_${task.createdAt}.mp4")
   473→                    segmentedDownloader.cancelDownload(outputFile)
   474→                }
   475→            }
   476→            activeDownloadJobs.clear()
   477→            activeDownloadTasks.clear()
   478→            updateActiveDownloads()
   479→        }
   480→    }

   610→    /**
   611→     * 打开应用文件夹（视频下载目录）
   612→     */
   613→    fun openFileLocation(filePath: String, context: Context) {
   614→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   615→            try {
   616→                val videoFile = File(filePath)
   617→                if (!videoFile.exists()) {
   618→                    withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
   619→                        android.widget.Toast.makeText(context, "文件不存在", android.widget.Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
   620→                    }
   621→                    return@launch
   622→                }
   623→
   624→                val parentDir = videoFile.parentFile ?: return@launch
   625→
   626→                withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
   627→                    var opened = false
   628→
   629→                    // 方式1：用 DocumentsUI 打开目录（兼容性最好）
   630→                    if (!opened) {
   631→                        try {
   632→                            val relativePath = parentDir.absolutePath.removePrefix("/storage/emulated/0/")
   633→                            val encodedPath = android.net.Uri.encode(relativePath, "/")
   634→                            val uri = android.net.Uri.parse("content://com.android.externalstorage.documents/document/primary:$encodedPath")
   635→                            val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW).apply {
   636→                                setDataAndType(uri, "vnd.android.document/directory")
   637→                                addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)
   638→                            }
   639→                            context.startActivity(intent)
   640→                            opened = true
   641→                        } catch (_: Exception) {}
   642→                    }
   643→
   644→                    // 方式2：用系统文件管理器 BROWSE 动作
   645→                    if (!opened) {
   646→                        try {
   647→                            val intent = Intent("android.provider.action.BROWSE").apply {
   648→                                data = android.net.Uri.parse("content://com.android.externalstorage.documents/document/primary:${parentDir.absolutePath.removePrefix("/storage/emulated/0/")}")
   649→                                addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)
   650→                            }
   651→                            context.startActivity(intent)
   652→                            opened = true
   653→                        } catch (_: Exception) {}
   654→                    }
   655→
   656→                    // 方式3：直接分享视频文件
   657→                    if (!opened) {
   658→                        try {
   659→                            val uri = androidx.core.content.FileProvider.getUriForFile(
   660→                                context, "${context.packageName}.fileprovider", videoFile
   661→                            )
   662→                            val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW).apply {
   663→                                setDataAndType(uri, "video/*")
   664→                                addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION)
   665→                                addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)
   666→                            }
   667→                            context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(intent, "打开视频文件"))
   668→                            opened = true
   669→                        } catch (_: Exception) {}
   670→                    }
   671→
   672→                    // 兜底：复制路径到剪贴板
   673→                    if (!opened) {
   674→                        val clipboard = context.getSystemService(Context.CLIPBOARD_SERVICE) as android.content.ClipboardManager
   675→                        clipboard.setPrimaryClip(android.content.ClipData.newPlainText("文件路径", parentDir.absolutePath))
   676→                        android.widget.Toast.makeText(
   677→                            context,
   678→                            "已复制文件夹路径: ${parentDir.absolutePath}",
   679→                            android.widget.Toast.LENGTH_LONG
   680→                        ).show()
   681→                    }
   682→                }
   683→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   684→                android.util.Log.e("HomeViewModel", "Error opening file", e)
   685→                withContext(Dispatchers.Main) {
   686→                    android.widget.Toast.makeText(context, "打开失败: ${e.message}", android.widget.Toast.LENGTH_LONG).show()
   687→                }
   688→            }
   689→        }
   690→    }

   852→    /**

   855→    private fun onDownloadFailed(taskId: String, task: DownloadTask, error: String) {
   856→        // 取消 job
   857→        activeDownloadJobs[taskId]?.cancel()
   858→        activeDownloadJobs.remove(taskId)
   859→
   860→        // 保留任务在列表中显示为失败状态，让用户手动关闭
   861→        val failedTask = task.copy(
   862→            status = DownloadStatus.FAILED,
   863→            errorMessage = error
   864→        )
   865→        activeDownloadTasks[taskId] = failedTask
   866→        updateActiveDownloads()
   867→
   868→        addToHistory(failedTask)
   869→
   870→        // 提示用户下载失败
   871→        _uiState.update { it.copy(snackbarMessage = "下载失败: ${error.take(50)}") }
   872→
   873→        // 处理队列中的下一个任务
   874→        processQueue()
   875→    }

   877→    /**
   878→     * 处理下载队列
   879→     */
   880→    private fun processQueue() {
   881→        if (downloadQueue.isEmpty()) return
   882→        if (activeDownloadTasks.size >= MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS) return
   883→
   884→        // 从队列中取出任务
   885→        val (taskId, task) = downloadQueue.entries.first()
   886→        downloadQueue.remove(taskId)
   887→        updateQueueList()
   888→
   889→        // 开始下载
   890→        startDownload(task.url) { _, _ -> }
   891→    }

   923→     */
   924→    private fun loadDownloadHistory() {
   925→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   926→            try {
   927→                val historyFile = File(application.filesDir, "download_history.json")
   928→                if (historyFile.exists()) {
   929→                    val json = historyFile.readText()
